metadata.description: A project-agnostic, AI-assisted dev flow for Claude Code, packaged as one installable plugin.

plugins.name: dev-flow
plugins.description: Project-agnostic AI-assisted dev flow: route feature vs bug, gather grounded context, gate on a plan (human-approved, or auto-approved for trivial presentational changes), build minimally, commit with intent, always-human review, and open a PR. Bundles the orchestrator (dev-flow) plus verify-ticket, plan-brief, investigate-bug, implement-brief, commit, pr, and pr-fix.
